stemHtml: Refer to figure or E(LO)6 chart from the Jeppesen GSPRM 2017. An aircraft is flying from VALENCIA (VLC) VOR/DME (39° 29'N, 000° 29'W) to ALMERIA (AMR) VOR/DME (36° 49'N, 002° 15'W) with the LE(R)-63 activated, using a conventional ATS route. What is the best route to avoid passing through this area?

options.d: VLC - A34 - ALT - W810 - VSJ - W820 - AMR
